tasks.name: agent_spotlight
tasks.prompt: Highlight one interesting AI agent from https://bankr.bot/agents and write a tweet explaining why it is interesting for builders. Tag @bankrbot.

tasks.name: builder_insight
tasks.prompt: Write one insightful tweet about AI agents, builders, or automation tools in crypto.

tasks.name: quote_viral_tweet
tasks.prompt: Find a viral tweet about AI agents or crypto builders and quote tweet with a thoughtful insight.

tasks.name: daily_thread
tasks.prompt: Write a short 3 tweet thread about interesting AI agents discovered this week.

tasks.name: reply_mentions
tasks.prompt: If someone tags @blockyonbase, reply with a helpful comment about builders or AI agents.
